items_flat.title_en: OpenAI Highlights GPT-5.6 Sol Cybersecurity Prowess and Codex Security Plugin
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 強調 GPT-5.6 Sol 網路安全能力並推廣 Codex Security 插件
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI posted on X showcasing GPT-5.6 Sol setting a new state of the art in cybersecurity benchmarks on 'The Last Ones' cyber range. They demonstrated how this translates to defensive outcomes via the Codex Security plugin in Codex, enabling teams to scan folders, identify/validate/fix vulnerabilities.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 X 上發文展示 GPT-5.6 Sol 在「The Last Ones」網路靶場達成網路安全新 SOTA。透過 Codex 中的 Codex Security 插件，這轉化為防禦成果，讓團隊掃描資料夾、識別/驗證/修復漏洞。
items_flat.analysis_en: This reinforces OpenAI's push into enterprise security tooling using frontier models, building on earlier Codex Security preview. It matters for practical adoption in code-heavy workflows but is promotional rather than a new launch; real impact depends on integration ease and false-positive reduction in production.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 這強化 OpenAI 利用前沿模型進軍企業安全工具的努力，建立在先前 Codex Security 預覽之上。對程式碼密集工作流採用很重要，但屬宣傳而非新發布；實際影響取決於生產環境整合便利性與誤報降低。
items_flat.quote: GPT-5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art in cybersecurity on “The Last Ones” cyber range.
items_flat.quote_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 在「The Last Ones」網路靶場達成網路安全新 SOTA。

openai.quote: GPT-5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art in cybersecurity on “The Last Ones” cyber range.
openai.quote_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 在「The Last Ones」網路靶場達成網路安全新 SOTA。

brief_en: Quiet day across frontier labs. OpenAI highlighted GPT-5.6 Sol's SOTA cybersecurity performance on 'The Last Ones' cyber range and promoted Codex Security plugin integration for real-world vuln scanning/fixing. No new model releases or major announcements from other tracked labs in the window.
brief_zh: 今日AI大廠動態平靜。OpenAI 強調 GPT-5.6 Sol 在「The Last Ones」網路靶場達成網路安全 SOTA，並推廣 Codex Security 插件整合，用於實際漏洞掃描與修復。窗口期內其他實驗室無新模型發布或重大公告。
